policy_description: Source-code policy: seed y_hist with actuals through origin, then write each finite horizon prediction back before scoring later horizons.
interpretation: Closest executable source-code replay. Remaining non-zero deltas, including horizon-1, indicate fitted-state or runtime drift beyond target-lag recursion choice.

policy_description: Counterfactual policy: after each horizon, write the target period actual into y_hist.
interpretation: Counterfactual recursion policy; larger deltas reject this as the parent implementation.

policy_description: Counterfactual policy: seed y_hist with all actuals, including future validation periods.
interpretation: Counterfactual recursion policy; larger deltas reject this as the parent implementation.

policy_description: Counterfactual policy: after each horizon, write archived parent component prediction into y_hist.
interpretation: Counterfactual recursion policy; larger deltas reject this as the parent implementation.

policy_description: Counterfactual policy: seed y_hist with actuals through origin and never update during the forecast path.
interpretation: Counterfactual recursion policy; larger deltas reject this as the parent implementation.
